sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n2310" key="ai)qeri/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">αἰθερίτης</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίθος,</foreign> a precious stone, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1386.tlg001:1:4" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Ps.-Callisth.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.4</biblScope> </bibl> (as <sense id="n2310.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">ἀέρινος</ref> </xr>).</sense> </entryFree>
